titleStmt.title: SII 15.220: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 220. (B.K. No. 87 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Pēṭe Basappa temple.

This is dated Śaka 1128, Prabhava, Pushya śu 8, Monday, Uttarāyana-saṅkramaṇa. The date is irregular. The said tithi corresponds to 1207 A.D., December 2�, which was Friday and not Monday. The Saṅkramaṇa occurred two days earlier, on December 26.

It records the gift of land and money to the god Telligēśvara by Arjunaseṭṭi, the Mummuridaṇḍas and others, after washing the feet of the Āchārya of the temple, Bhāskarāchārya, disciple of Kēdāradēva, when Chāvuṇḍayya is said to have been governing Muḷugunda Twelve in Beḷuvala-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadbhu
ḷāṁbaka kaṇṭha
kū¨rmmeyiṁ rakṣisu
rā dhirāja paramēśvara da cūḍāma
ṇi malerājarāja malapaṟo hoysaḷa vīraballāḷa
dēvavijayarājyamuttarō
cōḷanripāḷamattagaja
pratāpayuta pādapadmōpajīvi
patihitadalli gadoḷu śata
makhanaṁta bhōgado ¨rttikuṁ Atananujāta
nenasuṁ nītivida nikhiḷa svasti śrī ..
manmahāpasāytaṁ paramaviśvāsi śrīmatu kumāraṁ
goyyamayyana lamaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōda diṁdāḷuttami
re . tade mahāprabhu śāṁḍilya gōtrapa
vitraṁ mallarasatanūjāte veḍeyalli parā¨rtthadalli tānoḍa
ṟa dha¨rmmaja sakaḷavismayasaṁbhrita
tējada janaṁ jagadoḷu saddha¨rmmamaṁ pāḷisuti
kkoḍalā bhūmigaḷaṁ dānaṁgaḷaṁ
māḍu mā dēviya pādapadmārādhakaba cavuṁḍarājaṁ . śrīmatu
beḷuvalanāḍoḷagaṇa nālakuṁ yugadoḷu nālkuṁ rājadhāni paṭṭaṇaṁ muḷuguṁdada prabhāvamenteṁdaḍe . A
llalli dēvabhavanadinallallige paṇyavīthiyiṁduparigaḷiṁ nisuUdiṁdrana pura
maṁ . Ā nagara mahājanaṁgaḷa mahōnnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . dānigalenasuṁ kaṭṭabhimāniga ḷakhiḷāga
mōkti cārucaritra¨rbbūnutarene mahājanaṁgaḷa mahimeya pogaḷalēneṁnnaḷavē . Alliyaynū¨rbbara mahimeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe .The letter pē is written above the line.
māṟevuge kāva balupa dātaranikkuva sāhasa vaṁdinivahakkerada¨rtthama nittukī¨rttiyo
ḷu neṟedu dinēśaraṁnarenaloppuva kū¨rppu paṁca śatavīra dhātriyoḷu . Aṁtu su
janajanaṁgaḷiṁ tiṁtiṇiyāda catu¨ryyugada paṭṭaṇa muḷuguṁdahaṁneraḍuvaṁ heggaḍe cavuṁḍayyanadhikāra paddhatiyiṁdāḷutta
mi¨rppalli yā purakkadhideyvavenisida śrī telligēśvaradēvara stānācā¨ryyarappa kēdāra dēvara putraṁ bhāskarācā¨ryya
ra [ka¨rmma]niṣṭhaymaṁ vidvataya balmeyumaṁ kaṁḍu mecciheggaḍe cavuṁḍayyana śrī mahājana A¨rjunaseṭṭiyainū
¨rbbaru staḷasamastamuṁmuridaṁḍagaḷu taṁmāḷdaṁ goyyaṇna sōmayya nāgayyeṁ gaḷu mukhyavāgi vijaya
samudramenisida Ūra ballāḷadēvaṁge binnapaṁgeydu śrī telligēśvara dēvaraṁgabhōga naivēdya
yyāle nimittavāgi sakava¨rṣada 1128 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada puṣya sudda 8 sō
manāra vuttarāyaṇa saṁkramūṇa byatīpātadaṁdu pura paṁcamaṭhastānadavare sannidhiyalu bhāskarācā¨ryyara pādaprakṣā
ḷanaṁ geydu dānasvarūpavāgi dhārāpū¨rbbakamāgi sa¨rvvabādha parihāramāgi hiriya kōlalaḷedu koṭṭa
mattarāṟu Adakke caturāghāṭeveṁteṁdaḍe mūḍaṇa sīme ceṁcala gaḷa gōgalla keladale māguṁḍige hōda baṭṭe
teṁkaṇa sīme nāvida keyya horeyalu muḷuguṁdadiṁda yeḷavattige hōda baṭṭe paḍu vaṇa sīme yaḷavattiya holane
mēre baḍagaṇa sīme vokkaḷugoṁḍada haḷḷa Ā keyya nālkuvī dikkinalu naṭṭa liṁ mudrikeya kiṁnarigallu . Ācā¨rya
ra tapaprabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . śivadha¨rmāmritavā¨rddhiva¨rddhanasudhādhāraṁ śivajñānasaṁbhava vidyānidhi sa¨rbbaśāstrakuśalaṁ
dātmaniṣṭavisiṣṭapratirūpaha¨rmmya[va¨rṣa] śrī telligēśāghrikaṁjavilōḷāḷiye nalke baṇnisadarārī bhāskarācā
¨ryyaraṁ . pullasararūparapratimalla¨rssucaritracaritaranagharanuttaṁ telligarayvattūkkala nellaṁ pogaḷdapudu sakaḷa
dhātrītaḷadoḷu . Avaru biṭṭa dha¨rmma dēvara caitrakke vokkalalu hāgapavitrakke vokkalalu hāga vuttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇada
lā vokkalalu hāga dīpāḷigeyalu Iṁmaneṇne dēvara nityanivēdya naṁvādīvigege gāṇakke Aravanada soṭige yaṇne saṁta
yoḷage koḍakke sollage soṭige yeṇneyoṁdumaṁ baḷada sāmyadayvattokkala mane yalu maduveyādaḍe
gaṁḍiṁge haṇa 1 heṁṇiṁge haṇa 1 Ā telligēśvaradēvara maṭhagaḷa nivēśanada catussīme mūḍalu baṭṭevare
teṁkalu vuddihayaḍakilagallu paḍuvalu pa¨rbbadaṟe baḍagalu huṭṭida guṁḍukallu Adakke triśūla lāṁ
chana . priyadiṁdiṁtidaneyda kāva manujaṁgāyuṁ jayaṁ śrīyuvakke yidaṁ kāyade kāyva pāpige guru
kṣētraṁgaḷoḷu vāraṇāsiyoḷakkōṭi munīṁdraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdudoṁ dayasaṁ po¨rdugugeṁ
du sāṟidapuvī śailākṣaraṁ dhātriyoḷu . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi
Digital edition of SII 15.220 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
